arts.ttl: Champions League | Feyenoord v AC Milan: Match Preview
arts.sum: The iconic De Kuip stadium in Rotterdam will host a high-stakes Champions League knockout playoff first leg on Wednesday, as Feyenoord take on seven-time European champions AC Milan. This encounter marks Feyenoord's return to the knockout phase of Europe’s premier competition for the first time in nearly four decades, while Milan seek to reassert their dominance on the continental stage.
